message:
fix(snapshot_engine): increase trigger test sleep to account for 250ms poll step

The intelligent scheduler polls triggers with a 250ms wait_step. The
previous 100ms sleeps between trigger emissions were too short, causing
triggers to be missed. Increase to 350ms for reliable processing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
